LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT ADAM BLINN'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF HAS MET HIS BURDEN OF SHOWING THAT REASONABLE ATTEMPTS WERE MADE AT PERSONAL SERVICE BEFORE RESORTING TO SUBSTITUTED SERVICE UNDER. PLAINTIFF HAS ALSO COMPLIED WITH ALL THE REQUIREMENTS OF SUBSTITUTED SERVICE AT DEFENDANT'S USUAL PLACE OF BUSINESS PURSUANT TO CCP 415.20. DEFENDANT DOES NOT DISPUTE THAT THIS IS HIS EMPLOYER'S ADDRESS. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER #5976.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-21-2014 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-17-2013 Continued To Aug-28-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-11-2013 Continued To May-29-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
Off Calendar Apr-09-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT ADAM BLINN'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS is denied. Plaintiff has met his burden of showing that reasonable attempts were made at personal service before resorting to substituted service under. Plaintiff has also complied with all the requirements of substituted service at Defendant's usual place of business pursuant to CCP 415.20. Defendant does not dispute that this is his employer's address. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Sherry Sawyer #5976.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-20-2013 Continued To Apr-24-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion For Preliminary Injunction
Off Calendar Oct-25-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, the court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF RONALD ARTAC's Motion For Preliminary Injunction is Off Calendar - failed to post bond and failed to file TRO rendering this untimely per CCP 1008. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk K. Liu, not reported. (501/REQ)
